sentence: Galway City Council approved the new transport plan yesterday.
a1_settled_saying: Galway City Council approved the new transport plan yesterday.
a2_governing_object: The new transport plan’s approval by Galway City Council.
a3_settlement_work: The sentence moves the plan from undecided or pending status into approved civic status.
a4_range_scope: The settlement holds within Galway City Council’s decision authority and is temporally bounded by yesterday.
a5_governing_shape: An official civic decision lands on a transport plan.
a6_excluded_pull: Do not make “yesterday” or the council as institution the main settlement; the governing event is the approval of the plan.

sentence: The transport plan is now approved by Galway City Council.

a5_governing_shape: A plan remains in an approved civic condition.
a6_excluded_pull: Do not treat the sentence mainly as an action narrative; it foregrounds present status.

sentence: Ghaibh Comhairle Cathrach na Gaillimhe leis an bplean nua iompair inné.

sentence: Tá cruinniú AI á óstáil ag an bPorterShed Déardaoin seo.
